_about: Web-sourced pre-match bookmaker 3-way odds (American) for World Cup knockout fixtures. The live-annex sidecar to wc_manual_results.json: hand-recorded, sourced, frozen as a pre-match snapshot (asof = the matchday, before kickoff). NOT an API/feed. American odds preserve source fidelity; decimal + de-vig computed at load. Only the favourite-bet column is consumed downstream, so book and model price the SAME bet.
